name: humanspec_OR_cluster_chr1_chimpanzee
description: Human-specific duplicon contrast: OR_cluster_chr1. Status in Pan troglodytes: 'olfactory_pseudogene_pattern'. In human (GRCh38) the locus sits on chr1:~158.1 Mb; in this ape the syntenic region is approximated on chr1. Used by LLmap to refuse silent absorption of human-vs-ape divergence when mapping cross-species reads.

architecture.internal_structure: Reference contrast for OR_cluster_chr1. See Dennis 2012, Suntsova 2017, T2T-ape 2024 for duplicon-by-duplicon presence calls.

related_diseases: human-specific cortex expansion / neurodevelopmental dosage (e.g. OR_cluster_chr1)
